microsoft_ft: Owned product vision and roadmap for Azure's internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling specs and data pipeline requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and scaled the program to 45+ annual drills.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce **drill planning cycle time by 39%** and expand drill capacity by 21%, applying structured program management to an ambiguous, multi-team problem space.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then translated findings into a **data-driven roadmap** to automate critical paths and eliminate operational toil at scale.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and define success metrics for internal platform improvements.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across **1,200+ stations**, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot and ensuring foundational system reliability at scale.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, reducing cross-functional ambiguity and accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% across interdependent systems.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web and search presence using performance data to guide prioritization decisions.
